speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Things you enjoy
questions: What do you enjoy doing in your free time?
Is there anything you hate doing?
Do you miss anything from your childhood?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I enjoy reading books and listening to music. Yes, I hate waiting in long queues. I miss living in my hometown.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Limits and problems
questions: Is public transport big enough for everyone in your city?
Are some prices too high for young people?
What problems are too difficult to solve quickly?
speaking.sampleAnswer: No, public transport isn't big enough for everyone during rush hour. Yes, some prices are too high for young people. Traffic problems are too difficult to solve quickly.
